% Figure 1 — MaxContext-DualEnd worked example, N=10.
% PNG generated by paper/figures/dualend_overview.py (matplotlib).
% Re-render with: python3 paper/figures/dualend_overview.py

\begin{figure}[t]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=\columnwidth]{figures/dualend_overview.png}
\caption{A ten-document run of \textsc{MaxContext-DualEnd} fills the ranking from both ends as the live pool shrinks. Best (blue) and worst (orange) labels are removed jointly per LLM call; head/tail of $R$ are filled inward; the BM25 endgame is unused because the live pool reaches size 0 in five calls.}
\label{fig:dualend}
\end{figure}
